title: Victor Khosla Sees 'Fat' Tail Risk in Credit Markets
description: Victor Khosla, founder and CIO of Strategic Value Partners, warns about the contagion risk facing the credit market from the selloff in software stocks. He speaks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: C3.ai to Cut 26% of Workforce Following CEO Transition
description: C3.ai Inc., a maker of data analysis software, is cutting about a quarter of its workforce after the appointment of a new chief executive officer.

title: Zoom Gives Weaker Profit Outlook in Push to Expand Product Suite
description: Zoom Communications Inc. gave a profit outlook that fell short of analysts’ estimates, suggesting higher costs for the company while it aggressively pitches its expanded suite of products.
